free_text: Quality control and calibration of miniature fission
chambers by exposure to standard neutron fields.
Application to the measurement of fundamental
Thermal col. at the BR1 reactor at MOL.
Reactor and thermal neutron induced U-235
calibration data for the 10 chambers as obtained
from analysis of the exposures at center
Corrections for dead-time losses, undetected fission
fragments, fission of impurity isotopes and
SD:Updated to new date formats, lower case.
Corrections according last EXFOR rules and Dict.
Type of report was changed (R->S). Subents 011-012
were added from unpublished report. SAMPLE, ERR-ANALYS
